headline: Hershey (NYSE:HSY): Strongest Q1 Results from the Shelf-Stable Food Group
summary: Let’s dig into the relative performance of Hershey (NYSE:HSY) and its peers as we unravel the now-completed Q1 shelf-stable food earnings season.

headline: Is Mondelez International Stock Underperforming the Dow?
summary: Mondelez International has underperformed the Dow over the past year, but analysts are moderately optimistic about the stock’s prospects.

headline: The Ryl Company Closes $20 Million Series C to Accelerate Growth of Emerging "Modern Tea" Category
summary: MORRISTOWN, N.J., June 02, 2026--The Ryl Company, parent company of fast-growing iced tea brand, Ryl Tea, today announced the close of a Series C growth equity round of $20 million, led by Purchase Capital through its Ryl Growth Partners SPV. The investment will support the company's next phase of growth, including continued retail and Direct Store Delivery (DSD) expansion, the build-out of its innovation pipeline, and team investments across operations, sales, and brand.
